metadata.rule: Developers / oxidants are excluded. Analysis includes color shades, lighteners, mixers/correctors, and bond/color support products.

stylistProfile.title: שחר מלכה – 2026
stylistProfile.signatureBehavior: Frequent multi-brand formulation, suggesting practical product mixing across available color systems.
stylistProfile.summary: שחר מלכה in 2026 is primarily oriented around color maintenance and coverage services, with L'OREAL PROFESSIONNEL, JUL, TO DEL. driving most recorded color usage.
